name: go-dangling-cross-file-referrer-asks
desc: removing a def that ANOTHER file still references (per the refs index) is the real 'you'll break callers' signal → ask

name: go-dangling-self-only-referrer-clean
desc: removing a def whose ONLY referrer is the edited file itself is legitimate — self-exclusion drops the sole referrer → no ask. enrolled_refs pins that the referrer WAS enrolled, so the silence is self-exclusion, not an empty index

name: go-dangling-referenced-nowhere-clean
desc: removing a def that no file references is a clean deletion → no ask. enrolled_refs pins count 0 (a genuine absence, reached through a store that DID resolve — probeRefsCount fatals if it did not)

name: go-dangling-no-deletion-clean
desc: an edit that only ADDS a def deletes nothing, so the deletion-side check short-circuits before touching the store → no ask even with a cross-file referrer enrolled
